task_updates.executor_notes: Expanded the refactor coverage in `tests/test_admin_payments.py` and `tests/test_payment_cog_split.py` with parser assertions, identity-router regressions, zero-agent state-machine coverage, awaiting_admin_init silent-ignore coverage, stale test-receipt timeout coverage, manual_review duplicate blocking, explicit `PaymentUICog` load-without-`admin_chat_cog` coverage, and orphan-sweep repair/cancel ordering cases including the batch fan-out crash recovery path. Verified with `python -m py_compile tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py` and `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_social_route_tools.py -x`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed there are no tests mocking `_classify_payment_reply`, the pending-recipient router tests now assert the agent path is untouched on state-machine messages, `test_payment_ui_cog_loads_without_admin_chat_cog` explicitly loads `PaymentUICog` with a bot lacking `admin_chat_cog`, `test_initiate_batch_payment_atomic_all_or_none` asserts zero batch inserts on validation failure, and the new split-cog orphan-sweep tests cover batch fan-out crash cancellation without modifying the existing `tests/test_payment_cog_split.py` harness or `tests/test_scheduler.py`.
